name: Sour Cream Brunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour an angel food cake pan.
2. Mix all ingredients except filling in a large bowl. Add sour cream last.
3. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with half of the filling.
4. Pour the remainder of the batter over the filling.
5. Sprinkle the remaining filling evenly on top.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 1 hour.
Note: Recipe was a prize winner at the Del Mar County Fair in 1993, Jo Merrill.
